name: Magikey World
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鍵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>施</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>解</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "Magikey" monster from your Deck to your hand. The first time each non-Token Normal Monster you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect each turn, it is not destroyed. During your Main Phase: You can add 1 "Magikey Maftea" from your Deck to your hand, then place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Magikey World" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Magikey World" per turn.

You can only use this effect of "Magikey World" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Magikey World" per turn.

action: Places cards from the player's hand on the bottom of the Deck
